title: 7 Stocks to Buy as Infrastructure Spending Starts to Boom
text: According to Patrick Tyler Brown, an investment bank Raymond James analyst, the U.S. federal government may deliver “a once-in-a-generation type infusion for infrastructure projects in [the] coming years.” Meanwhile, there are signs that billionaires and institutional investors are starting to pour money into infrastructure stocks ahead of the government's likely, huge spending spree.

title: Union Pacific: Railroad Strikes Back With Biden's Support
text: Astute investors bought UNP's October lows, anticipating that the recent labor dispute challenges will be resolved expeditiously. They have been proven right so far. However, Union Pacific's operational and regulatory challenges need to be considered on an ongoing basis.

title: Union Pacific: Buy This Wonderful Stock At The Right Price
text: Union Pacific has a very strong track record of shareholder returns. Its network effect serves as an enduring moat for the company.

title: Union Pacific: The More It Drops, The More I Buy
text: In this article, I start by explaining why I expect more economic weakness in 2023, based on the Federal Reserve, ongoing trends, and persistent inflation. While that won't be fun for my net worth (if I'm right), it offers tremendous opportunities to buy high-quality dividend stocks.

title: Better Buy: Union Pacific or CSX?
text: Both railways have shown resilience amid a shaky economic climate. But one makes a better buy in today's market.

title: Union Pacific proposes pilot program to have just 1 person operating trains
text: Union Pacific, the Omaha, Nebraska-based rail giant, revealed a proposed pilot program on Tuesday to “redeploy” train conductors to grounds-based positions.  The announcement comes amid hearings at the Federal Rail Administration about a proposed rule that would require railroads to have at least two crew members in the cab of a locomotive.

title: 3 Surefire Dividend Stocks to Buy Hand Over Fist for 2023
text: These foundational stocks offer a quality choice for a balanced portfolio.

title: Watch these rail stocks in 2023, says Evercore
text: An analyst firm has come out with some rail stocks to watch in 2023, now that concerns about a disruptive strike have ebbed. President Joe Biden signed a bill earlier this month imposing a deal on rail-freight workers.

title: Union Pacific pausing embargo program after scrutiny from regulators, shippers
text: Union Pacific's chief executive has told federal regulators the railroad will pause its use of embargoes in order to give the congestion-alleviation practice a “hard look.”  UP (NYSE: UNP) had gotten flak from shippers, labor officials and the Surface Transportation Board for a dramatic increase in the number of embargoes it has issued this year and last year.

title: Union Pacific railroad puts its shipping limits on hold after backlash
text: OMAHA, Neb. — Union Pacific says it will stop imposing temporary limits on certain businesses' shipments while it reviews the policy that federal regulators and shippers criticized at a hearing last week.

title: Union Pacific pauses use of controversial freight rail embargoes
text: Union Pacific is pausing use of embargoes on the freight rail network, a method of easing congestion which has attracted regulatory and labor union scrutiny.

title: FRA hears clashing views from railroads, unions on train crew size
text: Railroads and unions gave conflicting views during a hearing by the Federal Railroad Administration (FRA) on a proposed rulemaking that would require freight trains generally to have at least two crew members in the locomotive cab. The agency is gathering public testimony through next week.

title: Union Pacific railroad shipping embargoes raise complaints
text: Some federal regulators and shippers are raising concerns about Union Pacific's decision to temporarily limit some businesses' shipments by using embargoes.

title: Union Pacific Railroad Included in Dow Jones Sustainability Index for First Time, Highlighting the Railroad's Sustainability Efforts
text: OMAHA, Neb. , Dec. 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Union Pacific was selected as a member of the Dow Jones Sustainability Index (DJSI) North America for the first time, underscoring its sustainable leadership and continued steps to achieve its ambitious environmental commitments.

title: Union Pacific Corporation Announces Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings Release Date
text: OMAHA, Neb. , Dec. 13, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP) will release fourth quarter 2022 financial and operating results on Tuesday, Jan. 24, 2023, at 7:45 a.m.

title: Rail industry must overcome strained labor relations in order to survive
text: The drama about whether union members would go on strike has passed, with Congress passing legislation and President Joe Biden signing that legislation requiring all unions to ratify the labor agreement that union and railroad negotiators reached in September.  But the battle scars still remain and those scars must be healed in order for the rail industry not only to fully restore service levels but also to thrive and assume the role as a vital and necessary freight transportation mode.

title: Union Pacific Corporation Declares Fourth Quarter 2022 Dividend
text: OMAHA, Neb. , Dec. 9, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Directors of Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP) has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.30 per share on the company's common stock, payable Dec. 29, 2022, to shareholders of record Dec. 19, 2022.

title: STB chairman slams Union Pacific over lack of information about embargoes
text: Chairman Marty Oberman has “serious concerns” about the lack of data that Union Pacific has provided to the Surface Transportation Board ahead of a two-day hearing on the railroad's use of embargoes. UP (NYSE: UNP) executives will be in Washington next Tuesday and Wednesday to explain why the railroad's use of embargoes has increased dramatically since 2017.

title: Activists Push Proposals at Union Pacific, Norfolk Southern to Provide Paid Sick Leave
text: On Tuesday, a pair of investment funds proposed shareholder resolutions at freight rail giants Union Pacific (US:UP) and Norfolk Southern (US:NSC) that would provide covered workers paid sick leave.

title: Biden's Intervention Averts Rail Strike: An Analysis
text: With the rail strike not materializing, the U.S. economy heaves a sigh of relief as a strike might have cost more than $2 billion a day.

title: What's Driving The Growth For Union Pacific Stock?
text: Despite a 14% fall year-to-date, we believe Union Pacific stock (NYSE: UNP) has little room for growth.
